login.title: Ipotali Yomdlali
login.subtitle: Ngena ukubona amaqembu, amanani, nokuhleleka kweligi yakho
login.appleIdentityTokenError: I-Apple ayibuyiselanga ithokheni yobunikazi. Sicela uzame futhi.

register.title: Dala I-akhawunti Yomdlali
register.subtitle: Bhalisa ukulandelela amanani akho futhi ujoyine amaqembu
register.activateAccountInstructions: Chofoza isixhumanisi ku-imeyili ukuvula i-akhawunti yakho, bese ungena lapha.
register.verificationEmailFailedFallback: I-akhawunti yakho idaliwe, kodwa asikwazanga ukuthumela i-imeyili yokuqinisekisa manje. Ngena futhi usebenzise "Thumela kabusha i-imeyili yokuqinisekisa" ukuze uthole isixhumanisi esisha.
register.passwordMin8: Iphasiwedi kufanele ibe namagama ayi-8 okungenani

forgotPassword.title: Setha Kabusha Iphasiwedi
forgotPassword.subtitle: Sizothumela isixhumanisi sokusetha kabusha ekhelini lakho le-imeyili eligciniwe
forgotPassword.sentBodySuffix: , sithumele isixhumanisi sokusetha kabusha iphasiwedi. Iphelelwa yisikhathi ehoreni elingu-1.

resendVerification.title: Thumela Kabusha Ukuqinisekisa
resendVerification.subtitle: Faka ikheli lakho le-imeyili futhi sizothumela isixhumanisi esisha sokuqinisekisa.
resendVerification.sentBody: Isixhumanisi esisha sokuqinisekisa sithunyelwe ku-{{email}}. Hlola ibhokisi lakho lokungenayo.
